# HyperYap

HyperYap is an open-source desktop speech-to-text application focused on local processing and user privacy.

Primary URLs:
- Website: https://hyperyap.com/
- Source: https://github.com/avalonreset/hyperyap
- Releases: https://github.com/avalonreset/hyperyap/releases/latest
- Privacy policy: https://github.com/avalonreset/hyperyap/blob/main/PRIVACY_POLICY.md

Key facts:
- Speech recognition runs locally on the user's machine by default.
- The project does not include analytics or telemetry.
- Transcription history is memory-only unless the user enables persisted history.
- Persisted history is limited to the last five transcriptions.
- The experimental HTTP API is localhost-only and does not enable CORS.
